narrative: USD mixed as ECB policymaker Muller suggests a rate move at the April meeting cannot be ruled out — EUR/USD trading at 1.1809. AUD/USD firms to 0.719 on steady Australian jobs data, keeping a May RBA hike in play. Gold higher +0.58% on safe-haven demand amid elevated geopolitical tensions, while equities rise +0.80% and VIX at 18.2. USD/JPY retreats to 158.82 as JPY gains on haven flows.
